title: epilobium brevifolium subsp. pannosum
intro: Epilobium brevifolium subsp. pannosum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae, commonly known as the willowherb or fireweed. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Epilobium brevifolium subsp. pannosum include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Epilobium brevifolium subsp. pannosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine.
